note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 2.2 cm x 4.8 cm x 1.0 cm.
  Wound bed: 77% slough, 23% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — improving.
Plan: Negative pressure wound therapy initiated. Debridement consult ordered.
Wound note - Leftfoot. Meas 2.2x4.8x1.0cm. Mod serosang drainage, odor present. Wound bed 62% gran, 38% slough. Periwound macerated. Foam dsg changed. Pt tolerated well. Dr. Ramirez notified.
